sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: CoreWeave, Inc. (CRWV) Investors: March 13, 2026 Filing Deadline in Securities Class Action - Contact Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP
feed.summary: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP has filed a securities fraud class action lawsuit against CoreWeave, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRWV) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between March 28, 2025, and December 15, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that CoreWeave made materially false and misleading statements regarding its ability to meet customer demand and its reliance on a single third-party data center supplier. Investors affected by these alleged misstatements have until March 13, 2026, to seek appointment as a lead plaintiff in the case.

feed.title: Raymond James Initiates Coverage on VTOL with Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Raymond James has initiated coverage on Bristow Group (VTOL) with an "Outperform" rating and a price target of $60.00. This positive endorsement follows a previous "Buy" rating from Jones Trading in January 2026. While analysts forecast an average target price of $52.33 with an 18.40% upside, GuruFocus estimates the fair value at $36.91, suggesting a potential downside.

feed.title: Hormel (NYSE: HRL) posts Q1 prelims and sells whole-bird turkey unit
feed.summary: Hormel Foods Corporation reported preliminary first quarter fiscal 2026 results, expecting net sales of approximately $3 billion and reaffirming its fiscal 2026 guidance. The company also announced a definitive agreement to sell its whole-bird turkey business to Life-Science Innovations, with minimal estimated impact on its 2026 financial guidance. These moves are part of Hormel's portfolio shaping efforts and reflect a solid start to the year, aiming for long-term profitable growth.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (CMRE) Costamare Inc. Reports Q4 Revenue $202.7M, vs. FactSet Est of $186.8M
feed.summary: Costamare Inc. (CMRE) reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter, with revenue reaching $202.7 million, significantly surpassing FactSet's estimate of $186.8 million. The company also announced an adjusted EPS of $0.60 per share for the quarter. Costamare Inc. primarily operates in marine freight and logistics, owning and chartering a diverse fleet of containerships and dry bulk vessels worldwide.

feed.title: Oppenheimer & Co. Inc. Lowers Stock Position in Equity Residential $EQR
feed.summary: Oppenheimer & Co. Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) by 83% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 35,611 shares and holding 7,309 shares valued at $473,000. Despite this, institutional investors collectively own 92.68% of the company's stock, and analysts maintain a "Hold" rating with an average target price of $69.78. Equity Residential reported slightly missed earnings and revenue expectations but announced a quarterly dividend and provided future EPS guidance.

feed.title: Costamare Inc. Reports Results for the Fourth Quarter and Year Ended December 31, 2025
feed.summary: Costamare Inc. (NYSE: CMRE) reported unaudited financial results for Q4 and the full year ended December 31, 2025, with an adjusted net income of $375.6 million for the year and $71.8 million for the fourth quarter from continuing operations. The company also announced new fixtures for 12 containerships, generating approximately $940 million in incremental contracted revenues, and increased its investment commitment in Neptune Maritime Leasing to $247.8 million. Costamare declared common and preferred stock dividends payable in early 2026.

feed.title: Chester County Tractor Supply Stores Invite Pets and Families to Farm Bash Celebration
feed.summary: Tractor Supply stores in Chester County are hosting a "Farm Bash" on Saturday, February 21, from 10 a.m. to 2 p.m., to celebrate "Animal Days." The event invites customers and their leashed pets for treats, giveaways, and community fun, including potential dog adoption events at select locations through a partnership with Petfinder. PepsiCo is also supporting the initiative with $120,000 in donations to local animal shelters.

feed.title: Inside Merck and Mayo Clinic’s AI push to speed new treatments
feed.summary: Merck and Mayo Clinic have announced a research and development collaboration aimed at accelerating drug discovery and precision medicine through the application of AI, advanced analytics, and multimodal clinical data. This agreement combines Mayo Clinic's extensive clinical insights, genomic data, and platform architecture with Merck's AI and machine learning research capabilities. The initial focus of the collaboration will be on high-need therapeutic areas within gastroenterology (IBD), dermatology (atopic dermatitis), and neurology (multiple sclerosis), leveraging Mayo Clinic's data to validate AI models and translate research into development strategies.

feed.title: News Corp Launches $1 Billion U.S. Share Buyback
feed.summary: News Corp has announced a plan to buy back up to US$1 billion of its Nasdaq-listed Class A and B shares, a program authorized in July 2025. This buy-back, conducted in cash and not requiring shareholder approval, aims to enhance shareholder value and provide capital management flexibility. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates NWSA as Neutral, citing improved fundamentals but weak technicals and valuation concerns.

feed.title: Bristol-Myers Squibb Co (NYSE:BMY) Offers a High Yield and Durable Dividend for Income Investors
feed.summary: Bristol-Myers Squibb Co (BMY) is highlighted as a strong dividend stock, offering a high yield of 4.21% and a consistent history of dividend increases. The company's robust earnings and efficient operations support its dividend payments, although a high payout ratio and significant financial debt warrant investor attention. BMY's current low price-to-earnings ratio further adds to its appeal as a potential income-generating investment.

feed.title: Activist Investor Responsible for Southwest Airlines Changes Targets Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings
feed.summary: Activist investor Elliott Investment Management, holding over 10% stake in Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH), is demanding significant changes following the sudden replacement of CEO Harry Sommer. Elliott cites NCLH's deteriorating margins, strategic errors, and poor leadership selection as reasons for its underperformance compared to peers. The investment company, known for its involvement with Southwest Airlines, is pushing for comprehensive Board changes, executive leadership review, and a new business plan focused on profitability, threatening to take its case directly to shareholders if its demands are not met.

feed.title: Expedia Group Inc. (NASDAQ:EXPE) Presents a Compelling Value Case for Investors
feed.summary: Expedia Group Inc. (NASDAQ:EXPE) is presented as a compelling value investment due to its significantly undervalued stock price compared to industry peers and the broader market, despite strong profitability and operational health. While the company exhibits excellent valuation metrics and high returns on capital, investors should be mindful of its mixed financial condition and projected slower growth rates. The article suggests that Expedia's current price offers a potential buffer against these risks, making it an attractive option for value-focused investors.

feed.title: Inside Viavi's 30-demo push into AI-driven networks at MWC
feed.summary: VIAVI (NASDAQ: VIAV) announced it will showcase over 30 technology demonstrations at MWC Barcelona from March 2-5, 2026, focusing on AI data centers, AIOps, 6G/AI-RAN, security, and quantum-safe communications. The company will also present its ePRTC360+ holdover clock, which offers 100 ns accuracy in GNSS-denied environments, and host daily live digital twin use case demonstrations. These initiatives highlight VIAVI's role in enabling AI-era networking and testing through its comprehensive suite of solutions and collaborations with over 20 partners.

feed.title: VIAVI Highlights Importance of Trusted Partner Collaboration in AI Era and Outlines Core Solution Areas for Communications and Networking at MWC Barcelona
feed.summary: VIAVI Solutions will showcase its latest network testing, automation, and intelligence solutions at Mobile World Congress (MWC) Barcelona 2026. The demonstrations will focus on the convergence of networks, AI, and security, emphasizing trusted partner collaborations in developing solutions for areas like AI data centers, mission-critical communications, 6G, and AI-RAN. Over 30 demonstrations, including a daily digital twin use case, will be presented, featuring innovations like the ePRTC360+™ holdover clock and various collaborative projects with over 20 partners.

feed.title: Cercano Management LLC Acquires Shares of 51,990 The Boeing Company $BA
feed.summary: Cercano Management LLC has acquired 51,990 shares of The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) worth approximately $11.22 million during the third quarter. This move aligns with other institutional investors increasing their stakes, bringing total institutional ownership to 64.82%. Boeing recently reported strong financial results, exceeding analysts' expectations with $9.92 EPS and $23.95 billion in revenue, leading to a "Moderate Buy" average analyst rating.

feed.title: CenterBook Partners LP Takes Position in Stanley Black & Decker, Inc. $SWK
feed.summary: CenterBook Partners LP acquired a new stake in Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE:SWK) during the third quarter, purchasing 116,320 shares valued at approximately $8.65 million. The industrial products company recently reported an earnings beat of $1.41 EPS against an expected $1.27, although revenue of $3.68 billion was slightly below estimates. Institutional ownership in Stanley Black & Decker is high at 87.77%, with major holders like Vanguard and State Street increasing their positions.

feed.title: Philip Morris International Inc. $PM Shares Sold by CenterBook Partners LP
feed.summary: CenterBook Partners LP significantly reduced its stake in Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE:PM) by 46.9% in the third quarter, selling 71,717 shares and retaining 81,230 shares valued at approximately $13.18 million. Despite this, other institutional investors increased their holdings. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for Philip Morris with an average target price of $194.06, supported by a 3.2% dividend yield.

feed.title: RLJ Lodging Trust $RLJ Holdings Lifted by Principal Financial Group Inc.
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group significantly increased its stake in RLJ Lodging Trust, acquiring an additional 191,377 shares to own 201,603 shares worth $1.45 million. While RLJ Lodging offers a 7.2% dividend yield, its 1,200% payout ratio raises concerns about sustainability. The stock trades around $8.29, and analysts have a mixed "Hold" consensus rating with an average $8.64 price target, indicating cautious optimism.

feed.title: CenterBook Partners LP Makes New $6.60 Million Investment in Procter & Gamble Company (The) $PG
feed.summary: CenterBook Partners LP invested $6.60 million in Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) during Q3, acquiring 42,929 shares. This comes amidst significant insider selling, with insiders disposing of over $54 million in shares, including Chairman Jon R. Moeller's sale of $26.35 million worth of stock. Despite insider sales, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for P&G, forecasting growth, while the company recently announced a quarterly dividend of $1.0568 per share.

feed.title: Apple Quietly Drops ESG Links From Top Executives’ Pay Packages
feed.summary: Apple Inc. has quietly removed the "ESG modifier" from its 2025 executive pay packages, affecting CEO Tim Cook and other top brass. This follows a trend seen in other major companies that began stripping diversity targets out of executive compensation. The provision, which allowed for bonus adjustments based on environmental performance like greenhouse gas reductions, had been in place since 2021.

feed.title: Advisor moves: LPL, Raymond James, Ascentis add advisors managing more than $900M
feed.summary: LPL Financial, Raymond James, and Ascentis Wealth Management have collectively added advisors managing over $900 million in client assets, continuing a strong trend of advisor movement in 2026. LPL welcomed Jason Mochi with $275 million from Morgan Stanley, while Raymond James Financial Services added the Touchpoint Financial Advisor Group with $682 million from Commonwealth Financial Network. Ascentis Wealth Management also expanded by bringing in Ascentis Family Wealth, led by Kevin Gray, which is expected to manage $250 million.

feed.title: There’s a $150 billion ‘YOLO’ trade incoming that will boost stocks by the end of March, Wells Fargo says
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analysts predict a $150 billion liquidity injection into the stock market by the end of March due to tax returns, which historically leads to a 13% average increase in the S&P 500 over six months. This phenomenon, dubbed "Return of YOLO," is expected to fuel speculative buying, particularly in options trading, aligning with historical patterns of strong March inflows and increased retail investor speculation since COVID-19.

feed.title: Farmer Brothers Coffee Co. announces second quarter financial results
feed.summary: Farmer Brothers Coffee Co. announced its second-quarter fiscal 2026 financial results, revealing a slight decrease in net sales but maintaining a gross margin above 35 percent. Despite challenges from higher costs and macroeconomic pressures, the company continues to focus on growing revenue and strengthening its customer base. The financial highlights include US$88.9 million in net sales, a gross profit of US$32 million, and a net loss of US$4.9 million for the quarter.

feed.title: Citigroup Adjusts Price Target on Welltower to $245 From $215, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Citigroup has increased its price target for Welltower (NYSE:WELL) shares to $245 from $215, while reaffirming a "Buy" rating on the specialized REIT. This adjustment follows several other analyst firms, including Morgan Stanley, BMO Capital, UBS, and Cantor Fitzgerald, which also recently raised their price targets for Welltower, generally maintaining positive ratings. The REIT recently reported strong Q4 2025 results and provided an optimistic outlook for 2026, citing robust senior-housing demand.

feed.title: Four-seat electric aircraft proposed for 36-minute Miami–Palm Beach hops
feed.summary: Vertical Aerospace is publicly displaying its Valo electric aircraft in Miami from February 24-25, showcasing its potential for inter-city travel in South Florida. The four-seat aircraft is designed for journeys up to 100 miles, with proposed routes reducing travel times between cities like Miami and Palm Beach to around 36 minutes. The company is exploring network partnerships and a hybrid-electric variant for longer distances, aiming to transform urban mobility.

feed.title: Enagás selects Emerson for digital management of Spain’s gas grid
feed.summary: Spain's national gas grid operator, Enagás, has chosen Emerson to provide digital management solutions to ensure the stability and security of the country's energy supply. Enagás will use Emerson's AspenTech Digital Grid Management solutions to monitor and optimize its 11,000km pipeline network and integrate renewable gases like biomethane and hydrogen. This strategic move aims to enhance system maintenance, cybersecurity, and overall utility operations, aligning with Enagás' goals for energy reliability and decarbonisation.

feed.title: Fortinet (FTNT) Beat Earnings — So Why Did It Just Get Downgraded?
feed.summary: Fortinet (FTNT) was downgraded to Hold by Freedom Capital Markets despite a strong Q4 2025 earnings beat, primarily due to valuation concerns. The stock's P/E ratio and other factors led to the downgrade, even though product revenue and billings growth exceeded expectations. However, several other analysts maintained or raised their price targets, indicating a mixed outlook for the cybersecurity firm.

feed.title: Globo JV puts BetMGM in strong position for 10% Brazil market share target, say operator execs
feed.summary: BetMGM's joint venture with Grupo Globo has positioned the company well to achieve its target of 10% market share in Brazil, according to its COO and CMO. Despite entering the regulated market later than some competitors, the partnership with Brazil's largest media group provided immediate credibility and brand recognition. MGM Resorts CEO Bill Hornbuckle believes this 10% target is achievable through a long-term strategic approach and rational investment.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Price Target on Builders FirstSource to $142 From $150, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has adjusted its price target for Builders FirstSource (NASDAQ: BLDR) to $142 from $150, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes after other analysts, including Baird and Wells Fargo, also revised their price targets for the company recently. Builders FirstSource specializes in building materials and services for the home building sector, with its latest earnings report indicating mixed results and a forecasted annual profit margin below estimates.

feed.title: S&P Global Highlights Climate And Liquidity Analytics Opportunity For Investors
feed.summary: S&P Global is expanding its risk analytics offerings by collaborating with Verisk on climate catastrophe exposure data and releasing a 2026 Liquidity Outlook. These initiatives aim to provide investors and lenders with more granular insights into climate and credit market risks, especially concerning private credit, AI-related technology sector issuance, and potential Federal Reserve policy shifts. The company is positioning itself as a core provider of essential risk management tools, reinforcing its significance in the evolving financial landscape.

feed.title: First National Bank of Omaha Invests $6.31 Million in Wells Fargo & Company $WFC
feed.summary: First National Bank of Omaha recently acquired a new position in Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE:WFC) valued at approximately $6.31 million by purchasing 75,306 shares. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their holdings in WFC, with Brighton Jones LLC significantly boosting its stake. The article also covers recent analyst ratings, Wells Fargo's stock performance, and its latest quarterly earnings, which surpassed analyst estimates.

feed.title: Waycross Partners LLC Decreases Stock Position in Wells Fargo & Company $WFC
feed.summary: Waycross Partners LLC significantly reduced its stake in Wells Fargo & Company ($WFC) by 90.4% in the third quarter, selling 424,385 shares and retaining 45,000 shares valued at approximately $3.77 million. Wells Fargo reported strong quarterly EPS of $1.76 against estimates of $1.66 and revenue of $11.97 billion, an increase of 4.5% year-over-year, and has a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with a $97.03 price target. Institutional investors collectively own about 75.9% of the company's stock, with major firms like Vanguard and Norges Bank increasing their positions.

feed.title: We Like Bristol-Myers Squibb's (NYSE:BMY) Earnings For More Than Just Statutory Profit
feed.summary: Bristol-Myers Squibb (NYSE:BMY) recently announced strong earnings results, which were well-received by the market. The company exhibited a healthy accrual ratio of -0.11, indicating excellent cash conversion where free cash flow significantly exceeded reported profit, despite a decline in free cash flow over the last year. Additionally, unusual items totaling US$6.7 billion reduced reported profit, suggesting that the underlying earnings power of the company may be better than its statutory profit suggests.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Board Refresh And Animal Days Add New Angle To Valuation
feed.summary: Tractor Supply (NasdaqGS:TSCO) has appointed Sonia Syngal to its Board of Directors and launched a new "Animal Days" event to boost customer engagement. These strategic moves come as the company seeks to refresh its board expertise and enhance customer connection, despite a mixed recent stock performance. Investors are advised to consider Syngal's e-commerce background and the potential impact of "Animal Days" on store traffic and brand perception, while also noting the stock is currently valued 47% above its estimated fair value.

feed.title: Modernagate Fallout, Disc’s Rejection, Compass’ Psilocybin Data, CDC’s Lost Leaders
feed.summary: This article discusses several significant developments in the biotech and pharmaceutical sectors. The FDA rejected Moderna's mRNA-based flu vaccine, citing an inadequate comparator group, and also rejected Disc Medicine's rare disease drug bitopertin due to regulatory uncertainty. Meanwhile, Compass Pathways reported strong Phase 3 data for its psilocybin-based depression drug, and the CDC is once again leaderless following the departure of Jim O’Neill.

feed.title: Should Credicorp’s Rising Earnings and Mibanco’s SaaS Shift Require Action From Credicorp (BAP) Investors?
feed.summary: Credicorp reported strong financial results for Q4 2025 and full-year 2025, with increased net interest income and net income. This improved profitability is complemented by Mibanco's adoption of Temenos SaaS, signaling a modernization of digital microfinance services for SMEs. Investors should consider how these developments impact Credicorp's investment narrative, balancing higher earnings potential with the inherent risks of expanding into riskier digital lending segments and the need for significant tech investments.

feed.title: Advisors Capital Management LLC Grows Stake in Medtronic PLC $MDT
feed.summary: Advisors Capital Management LLC increased its stake in Medtronic PLC by 2.9% in the third quarter, now owning 435,376 shares. This increase is part of a larger trend of institutional investors growing their positions in Medtronic, which recently beat Q3 revenue and adjusted EPS expectations due to strong demand in cardiovascular and diabetes sectors. Despite some margin pressures, the company reiterated its FY26 guidance and has received analyst upgrades, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average price target of $111.21.

feed.title: BOK Financial Private Wealth Inc. Lowers Holdings in Johnson & Johnson $JNJ
feed.summary: BOK Financial Private Wealth Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Johnson & Johnson by 35.7% in Q3, selling 4,699 shares. Despite this, other institutional investors, such as AustralianSuper and the Treasurer of North Carolina, increased their holdings, with institutional ownership of JNJ standing at approximately 69.55%. Key positive catalysts for J&J include the FDA approval of a once-monthly dosing for RYBREVANT FASPRO and continued strong growth in its MedTech segment, while legal risks from talc verdicts remain a negative factor.

feed.title: AtriCure (ATRC): BTIG Reiterates Buy Rating and $54 PT | ATRC St
feed.summary: BTIG has reiterated a Buy rating for AtriCure (ATRC) with a price target of $54. This decision aligns with a positive trend of analyst ratings for ATRC, including recent Buy or Overweight ratings from Needham, JP Morgan, and Canaccord Genuity. Analysts collectively project an average target price of $53.38, implying a 61.89% upside from the current price, further supported by GuruFocus' estimated GF Value suggesting a 45.34% upside.

feed.title: Advisors Capital Management LLC Has $50.64 Million Stock Position in Williams Companies, Inc. (The) $WMB
feed.summary: Advisors Capital Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Williams Companies, Inc. (NYSE:WMB) by 2.3% to 799,432 shares, valued at approximately $50.64 million, while institutional investors now collectively own 86.44% of the company. The company has received multiple analyst upgrades and price target increases, with management projecting over 10% CAGR in adjusted EBITDA through 2030. Williams Companies also raised its quarterly dividend to $0.525, representing a 2.9% yield, despite slightly missing quarterly EPS estimates.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company $WFC Shares Sold by Advisors Capital Management LLC
feed.summary: Advisors Capital Management LLC significantly reduced its stake in Wells Fargo & Company ($WFC) by 18% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 130,900 shares and retaining 596,861 shares valued at approximately $50.03 million. Despite this, Wells Fargo exceeded recent EPS estimates with $1.76 versus $1.66, announced a $0.45 quarterly dividend, and holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $97.03. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings, and the company's stock currently trades around $87.35 with a P/E of 13.93.

feed.title: Advisors Capital Management LLC Acquires 12,699 Shares of The J. M. Smucker Company $SJM
feed.summary: Advisors Capital Management LLC has increased its stake in The J. M. Smucker Company (NYSE:SJM) by 4.7%, acquiring an additional 12,699 shares for a total of 283,090 shares valued at approximately $30.74 million. The company reported Q3 EPS of $2.10, slightly missing consensus, with revenue of $2.33 billion, and announced a quarterly dividend of $1.10. Institutional investors currently own about 81.7% of the stock, which has a consensus analyst rating of "Hold" and a target price of $114.93.

feed.title: Advisors Capital Management LLC Buys 23,939 Shares of Philip Morris International Inc. $PM
feed.summary: Advisors Capital Management LLC has increased its stake in Philip Morris International (NYSE:PM) by 3.5%, acquiring an additional 23,939 shares during the third quarter, bringing their total holdings to 698,892 shares valued at $113.36 million. The company's recent earnings reported $1.70 EPS, matching estimates, with revenue slightly below expectations. Philip Morris International also announced a quarterly dividend of $1.47 per share, yielding 3.2% annually, and has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $194.06.

feed.title: ONEOK, Inc. $OKE Shares Purchased by Advisors Capital Management LLC
feed.summary: Advisors Capital Management LLC significantly increased its stake in ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE:OKE) by 23.6% in the third quarter, bringing their total holdings to 759,241 shares valued at approximately $55.4 million. Other major institutional investors also made significant moves, with Norges Bank initiating a large new position and Vanguard Group increasing its extensive holdings. ONEOK recently raised its quarterly dividend to $1.07, resulting in a 5.0% yield and a payout ratio of 78.7%.

feed.title: News Corp updates ASX daily disclosures as $1bn repurchase program proceeds
feed.summary: News Corp has reported ongoing share repurchases under its US$1 billion 2025 repurchase program, as shown in its daily ASX disclosures. The company bought 1,366,844 shares for over US$33.8 million on February 17, 2026. To date, approximately US$55 million of the authorized US$1 billion has been utilized, with repurchases aimed at enhancing shareholder value.

feed.title: Earnings Scheduled For February 18, 2026
feed.summary: This article lists companies scheduled to report their quarterly earnings on February 18, 2026. It provides projected earnings per share and revenue figures for numerous companies, categorized by those reporting before the bell and those reporting after the bell. Companies like Analog Devices, Global Payments, Moodys, Carvana, eBay, and Occidental Petroleum are highlighted with their expected financial performance.

feed.title: Condor Capital Management Buys Shares of 5,484 Teledyne Technologies Incorporated $TDY
feed.summary: Condor Capital Management has acquired a new stake of 5,484 shares in Teledyne Technologies (NYSE:TDY) valued at approximately $3.21 million during the 3rd quarter. Institutional investors now own about 91.58% of the company's stock. Teledyne reported strong Q4 results, exceeding revenue and EPS estimates, and issued positive FY2026 guidance, leading to a "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average price target of $627.88.

feed.title: Is Colgate Palmolive (CL) Still Attractive After Its Strong Share Price Run In 2025
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) has seen significant share price growth, prompting an analysis of its current valuation. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 23.3%, while a Price-to-Earnings (P/E) comparison indicates it is overvalued relative to industry peers and its own "Fair Ratio." The article encourages investors to use "Narratives" for personalized valuation based on their assumptions.

feed.title: NEOS Investment Management LLC Raises Holdings in Ingersoll Rand Inc. $IR
feed.summary: NEOS Investment Management LLC increased its stake in Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR) by 17.3% during the third quarter, bringing their total holdings to 132,519 shares valued at $10.95 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in the company. Ingersoll Rand reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.02 per share.

feed.title: NEOS Investment Management LLC Boosts Holdings in Intercontinental Exchange Inc. $ICE
feed.summary: NEOS Investment Management LLC increased its stake in Intercontinental Exchange Inc. (NYSE:ICE) by 41.0% in the third quarter, now owning 87,054 shares valued at $14.67 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings, while company insiders sold shares worth over $4.8 million in the last ninety days. Analysts maintain a "Buy" rating for ICE, with an average price target of $195.40, following strong Q4 earnings where EPS beat estimates by $0.04 and revenue exceeded expectations.
